42:1:1.m: Ha Meem (special letters that begin this chapter)

42:3:1.m: like that (referring to what Allah reveals to you) (subject of يُوحِىٓ)

كَ: (referring to what Allah reveals to you) (subject of يُوحِىٓ)

42:3:9.m: The Intensely Mighty One (name of اللَّهُ)

42:4:9.m: The Most High (one of Allah's names, subject of this ayah)

عَلِىُّ: Most High (one of Allah's names, subject of this ayah)

42:4:10.m: the Great, the Magnificent (describing هُوَ - He)

42:5:3.m: they (feminine) are splitting themselves open (subject of تَكَادُ)

42:5:4.m: from (connects فَوْقِ to what comes before it)

42:5:9.m: their Lord (the one who nurtures and sustains them)

رَبِّ: Lord (the one who nurtures and sustains

42:5:10.m: and they seek forgiveness (for those on Earth)

42:5:13.m: of the earth (in فِى ٱلْأَرْضِ - in the earth)

42:5:17.m: he/it (referring to Allah in this ayah)

هُوَ: he/it (referring to Allah in this ayah)

42:5:18.m: The Most Forgiving (One of Allah's names)

42:6:9.m: and not (you are not over them as a guardian)

مَآ: not (you are not over them as a guardian)

42:6:11.m: upon them/over them (having authority over اوْلِيَآء)

42:6:12.m: as a guardian/protector (describing what أَنتَ is not)

42:7:4.m: a scripture (object of أَوْحَيْنَآ - we revealed)

42:7:7.m: mother/main city (object of لِّتُنذِرَ - for you to warn)

42:7:10.m: around it (referring to Mecca, the mother of cities)

هَا: it (referring to Mecca, the mother of cities)

42:7:11.m: and (that) you warn (purpose of أَوْحَيْنَآ/We revealed)

42:7:13.m: the gathering (in يَوْمَ ٱلْجَمْعِ - Day of Gathering)

42:7:16.m: in it (referring to يَوْمَ ٱلْجَمْعِ - Day of Gathering)

42:7:17.m: a group (that is separate from others)

فَرِيق: a group (that is separate from others)

42:7:20.m: and a group (subject of في السعير - in the Blaze)

ٌ: (subject of في السعير - in the Blaze)

42:8:5.m: a community (object of لَجَعَلَهُمْ - He would have made them)

42:8:6.m: one (feminine, describing أُمَّةً - nation, as the object)

ً: describing أُمَّةً - nation, as the object

42:8:13.m: and the wrongdoers (subject of 'have no protector')

42:9:9.m: and he/it (subject of يُحْىِ - gives life)

42:9:16.m: All-Powerful/Most Capable (describing Allah's attribute of complete power over everything)

ٌ: (describing Allah's attribute of complete power over everything)

42:10:1.m: and what (refers to things being disputed)

42:10:3.m: in it (referring to what you differed/disagreed about)

هِ: it (referring to what you differed/disagreed about)

42:10:6.m: so its judgment (referring to whatever was disputed)

42:10:9.m: that (pointing to something far) (subject of اللَّهُ)

42:10:11.m: my Lord (connected to تَوَكَّلْتُ - I put my trust)

42:10:13.m: I put my complete trust (in عَلَيْهِ - in Him)

42:11:1.m: Creator/Originator (of السَّمٰوٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ - the heavens and earth)

42:11:2.m: of the heavens (possessed by فَاطِرُ - Creator)

42:11:7.m: your selves (referring to the plural 'you' being addressed)

كُمْ: your (referring to the plural 'you' being addressed)

42:11:8.m: pairs (as the object being created by جَعَلَ)

ًا: (as the object being created by جَعَلَ)

42:11:10.m: the cattle (referring to livestock mentioned in this verse)

أَنْعٰمِ: cattle (referring to livestock mentioned in this verse)

42:11:13.m: in it (referring to being like Him)

42:12:2.m: keys/means of control (plural, subject of له)

42:12:4.m: and the earth (possessed by/connected to something)

42:12:6.m: the provision (object of يَبْسُطُ - He extends)

42:13:7.m: with it/him (referring to what was advised)

42:13:14.m: with/by it (referring to what was advised)

42:13:20.m: the complete system (object of أَقِيمُوا - establish)

42:13:22.m: you (all) become split/separated (negative command with لا)

42:13:26.m: the polytheists (those who associate partners with Allah)

42:13:35.m: and he guides (connected to يَجْتَبِىٓ - he chooses)

42:13:36.m: to him (refers to Allah in this ayah)

42:14:14.m: from (connects بَعْدِ to what comes before it)

42:14:15.m: your master who cares for you (connected to مِن)

42:14:19.m: surely it would be judged/decided (in response to لَوْلَا - if not for)

42:14:23.m: they were made to inherit (referring to الَّذِينَ)

42:14:24.m: the book (object of أُورِثُوا - they were made to inherit)

42:15:3.m: and be steadfast! (connected to فَٱدْعُ - so call)

ٱسْتَقِمْ: be steadfast! (connected to فَٱدْعُ - so call)

42:15:7.m: do not follow! (referring to desires/whims in أَهْوَآءَهُمْ)

42:15:9.m: and say! (connecting to the previous command فَٱدْعُ - so call/invite)

42:15:11.m: with what/with that which (connects to أَنزَلَ)

42:15:13.m: Allah (as the subject of يَجْمَعُ - He gathers)

ُ: (as the subject of يَجْمَعُ - He gathers)

42:15:17.m: so that I may act fairly

42:15:30.m: Allah (as the subject of يَجْمَعُ - He gathers)

ُ: as the subject of يَجْمَعُ - He gathers

42:15:32.m: between us (in لَا حُجَّةَ بَيْنَنَا - no dispute between us)

42:15:34.m: the final destination (subject of the sentence)

42:16:13.m: their Lord (the one who nurtures and sustains them)

42:17:3.m: he caused to descend/he sent down (subject: اللَّهُ)

42:17:4.m: the book (object of أَنزَلَ - sent down)

42:17:11.m: near (describing the Hour/Final Day, stated as a general fact)

ٌ: (describing the Hour/Final Day, stated as a general fact)

42:18:2.m: with it/her (referring to الساعة - the Hour)

42:18:3.m: those who (referring to multiple people who don't believe in يَسْتَعْجِلُ بِهَا)

نَ: (referring to multiple people who don't believe in يَسْتَعْجِلُ بِهَا)

42:18:9.m: those who are anxious/worried (about مِنْهَا - about it)

42:18:10.m: from it/her (referring to ٱلسَّاعَةِ - the Hour)

42:18:11.m: and they know (that it is the truth)

42:18:17.m: they argue back and forth (about الساعة - the Hour)

42:18:19.m: of the Hour (referring to the Day of Judgment)

42:19:3.m: with His servants (showing how Allah is Gentle with them)

42:19:7.m: and he/it (subject of لَطِيفٌ and يَرْزُقُ)

42:19:8.m: The All-Strong (as a name/attribute of Allah)

42:19:9.m: The Mighty One (a name of Allah)

42:20:14.m: the worldly life (object of يُرِيدُ - wants/desires)

42:20:16.m: from it/her (referring to الدُّنْيَا - worldly life)

42:21:4.m: they made a path/established laws (subject of لَهُم)

42:21:16.m: surely it would have been judged (result of لَوْلَا - if not for)

42:21:17.m: between them (referring to the false partners/شُرَكٰٓؤُا۟ mentioned earlier)

42:21:18.m: and indeed/verily (connects to previous statement about wrongdoers)

42:21:19.m: the ones who act very unfairly

42:22:5.m: they earned/acquired (what they're fearful of in مِمَّا)

42:22:15.m: of the gardens (possessed by رَوْضَاتِ - meadows)

42:22:19.m: near/at/with (location relative to رَبِّهِمْ - their Lord)

42:22:23.m: the favor, the blessing (subject described by الْكَبِيرُ)

42:23:2.m: who/which (connecting to يُبَشِّرُ - gives good news)

42:23:5.m: His servants (being given glad tidings by يُبَشِّرُ)

42:23:7.m: they believed (subject of يُبَشِّرُ - gives good news to)

ا۟: (subject of يُبَشِّرُ - gives good news to)

42:23:8.m: and they worked/did deeds (connecting to ءَامَنُوا۟ - believed)

42:23:14.m: a reward (object of أَسْـَٔلُكُمْ - I ask you)

42:23:25.m: goodness (object of نَّزِدْ - we will increase)

42:23:28.m: Most Forgiving (as a general attribute of Allah)

42:23:29.m: Most Appreciative (as an attribute of Allah غَفُورٌ)

42:24:8.m: he wishes/wants (in a special grammatical form)

42:24:10.m: he seals (in conditional phrase with إِن)

42:24:18.m: by His words (referring to Allah's words)

42:26:6.m: and He increases them (referring to the rewards of those who believe and do good deeds)

42:27:6.m: they would surely transgress (result of لَوْ بَسَطَ - if He had expanded)

42:28:2.m: the One who (sends down the rain)

42:28:10.m: His mercy (object of يُنَزِّلُ - He sends down)

42:28:12.m: The Protector (as a name/attribute of Allah)

42:28:13.m: the praiseworthy one (a name/attribute of Allah)

42:29:8.m: in both of them (referring to السَّمٰوٰتِ 'the heavens' and الْأَرْضِ 'the earth')

42:30:1.m: and what/and not (introduces a question or negation in أَصٰبَكُم)

42:30:2.m: it afflicted you all (referring to مُّصِيبَةٍ - a calamity)

42:30:3.m: from (connects مُّصِيبَةٍ to what comes after)

42:30:7.m: your (plural) hands (referring to what you have done with your own power)

42:31:3.m: able to escape/overpower (lit: by those who can weaken)

42:32:3.m: the ships (that are in ٱلْبَحْرِ/the sea)

42:33:2.m: he wills/wishes (subject of يُسْكِنِ - he calms)

42:33:4.m: the wind (object of يُسْكِنِ - He stills)

42:33:5.m: and so they (feminine) remain (result of يُسْكِنِ - He calms)

42:33:8.m: its surface (referring to the sea's surface)

42:33:11.m: that (pointing to something specific in the ayah)

42:33:12.m: surely signs (being described by صَبَّارٍ شَكُورٍ)

42:33:15.m: one who shows much gratitude (describing صَبَّارٍ)

42:34:6.m: away from (relates to يَعْفُ - He pardons)

42:35:2.m: those who (subject of يُجٰدِلُونَ - they dispute)

42:35:3.m: they argue back and forth (with someone)

42:35:6.m: any (working with مِن مَّحِيصٍ to mean 'there is not any escape')

42:35:7.m: for them/they have (related to مَحِيصٍ - escape)

42:35:9.m: any place or way of escape

دُّنْيَا: worldly life (lower/closer life compared to the afterlife)

42:36:12.m: and more lasting (connected to خَيْرٌ - better)

42:36:14.m: they believed (referring to those who trust in Allah)

ا۟: (referring to those who trust in Allah)

42:36:16.m: their Lord (the one they rely upon in يَتَوَكَّلُونَ)

42:36:17.m: they put their complete trust (in someone/something)

42:37:2.m: they keep themselves away (from كَبٰٓئِرَ ٱلْإِثْمِ - major sins)

42:38:7.m: mutual consultation (part of وَأَمْرُهُمْ - and their affairs)

42:39:3.m: it afflicted/struck them (subject of يَنتَصِرُونَ - they seek help)

42:40:2.m: a bad deed (being described by مِّثْلُهَا)

42:40:4.m: exactly similar to it (referring to سَيِّئَةٍ - evil deed)

42:42:1.m: indeed only/verily only (restricts what comes after it)

42:42:2.m: the path (subject of being upon those who oppress)

ُ: (subject of being upon those who oppress)

42:42:12.m: those (far away, addressing the people mentioned)

ئِكَ: far away, addressing the people mentioned

42:43:2.m: he was patient (subject of وَغَفَرَ - and he forgave)

42:43:5.m: that (referring to what was mentioned before about patience and forgiveness)

كَ: what was mentioned before about patience and forgiveness

42:44:2.m: he causes to stray (subject of مَن)

42:44:7.m: any protector/guardian (object of مِن in مِن وَلِىٍّ)

42:44:13.m: they saw (subject of يَقُولُونَ - they say)

42:45:3.m: upon it/her (referring to being presented to the Fire)

42:45:4.m: those who are humble (describes those being presented)

42:45:7.m: they are looking (at the Fire in humiliation)

42:45:12.m: those who (referring to the believers mentioned after)

42:45:20.m: on the day (time when خَسِرُوا/they lost occurred)

42:46:1.m: and not (negating يَنصُرُونَهُم - they help them)

42:46:2.m: he/it was (describes what they had - لَهُم)

42:46:3.m: for them/to them (referring to those who have no protectors)

42:46:7.m: from (connecting protectors to them, with emphasis)

42:46:9.m: Allah (possessed by/connected to something after it)

42:46:11.m: he makes (someone) lose the way (jussive mood)

42:46:13.m: then what/so what (connects to يُضْلِلِ - leads astray)

42:47:15.m: from/of/among (emphasized because it follows similar sound)

42:47:16.m: any place of refuge (object of مِن)

42:47:17.m: on that day (referring to the day mentioned earlier when there will be no refuge from Allah)

42:48:9.m: except (in this ayah, it shows the only thing required of the Prophet ﷺ)

42:48:12.m: whenever (conditional, in this ayah introducing the result of أَذَقْنَا - we give a taste)

42:48:17.m: he became happy (subject of إِذَآ أَذَقْنَا)

42:48:23.m: she put forward (what came before in the ayah)

42:48:24.m: their hands (referring to those who turned away in the ayah)

42:48:26.m: the human being (object of أَذَقْنَا - we gave to taste)

َ: (object of أَذَقْنَا - we gave to taste)

42:48:27.m: an extremely ungrateful person (describing الْإِنسٰنَ - mankind)

42:49:7.m: he wants/wishes (subject of يَهَبُ - he gives)

42:49:8.m: he gives/grants (subject of يَشَآءُ - he wills)

42:49:12.m: and He gives as a gift

42:49:15.m: the males (object of يَهَبُ - He grants)

ًا: (as the ones being paired/married off by Allah)

42:50:8.m: unable to have children (object of يَجْعَلُ - He makes)

42:50:9.m: indeed He (refers to Allah being عَلِيمٌ قَدِيرٌ)

42:50:11.m: All-Powerful (as a divine attribute of Allah)

42:51:2.m: he was (negated by ما before it)

42:51:3.m: for any human (who اللَّهُ speaks to)

42:51:4.m: that (connects to يُكَلِّمَهُ - speaks to him)

42:51:5.m: he speaks to him (object of أَن)

42:51:8.m: by revelation (object of يُكَلِّمَهُ - speaks to him)

42:51:12.m: a barrier/screen (coming after مِن وَرَآئِ - from behind)

42:51:15.m: a messenger (object of يُرْسِلَ - he sends)

42:51:22.m: wise, full of wisdom (describes اللَّهُ - Allah)

42:52:11.m: the book (subject of تَدْرِى - you knew)

42:52:15.m: we made/set it (referring to نُورًا - a light)

42:52:16.m: a light (object of جَعَلْنٰهُ/we made it)

42:52:23.m: and indeed you (subject of تَهْدِى - you guide)

42:53:6.m: in (location preposition connecting ما with السَّمٰوٰتِ)

42:53:10.m: of the earth (after فِي in this ayah)

42:53:11.m: indeed! (introducing what follows in إِلَى ٱللَّهِ - to Allah)

42:53:14.m: it becomes/goes (referring to الْأُمُورُ - the matters)

42:53:15.m: the matters, the affairs (subject of تَصِيرُ - returns to)
